Discuss the process of deploying a deep learning model, specifically designed using Python, on the Amazon Web Services (AWS) platform.  
DEPLOYING MODELS REQUIRES CONFIGURING EC2 INSTANCES AND S3 BUCKETS.  
* * *  
SET UP INFRASTRUCTURE WITH AWS LAMBDA AND API GATEWAY.  
SECURE DATA TRANSFER WITH ENCRYPTION AND IAM POLICIES.  
* * *  
OVERFITTING IMPACTS MODEL PERFORMANCE AND INFERENCE SPEED.  
MONITORING AND TUNING HELP MITIGATE THESE ISSUES.  
* * *
